prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 16472→18376→19970→20470→22630，整体呈持续后移趋势，近 5 年累计后移约 6158 名，近 3 年累计后移约 2660 名；2025 年基准位次约 22630 名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划 2021 年 45 人、2022 年 43 人、2023 年 40 人、2024 年 44 人、2025 年 42 人；2026 年计划 40 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招约 4.8%，缩招通常使竞争略有缓解，位次数字趋于减小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流建设高校；软科主榜 2026 年约第 66 名，近年排名稳定在 65–76 区间，属于中上游 211 院校；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 92 位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未见明显报考关注升温信号；历史无投档断档记录；应用经济学 A+（全国顶尖）、工商管理 A、统计学 A-，财经类学科实力突出，对报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 财经类专业整体社会热度分化，但西财作为老牌财经强校仍具品牌效应；广东省 2026 年物理类考生约 45.6 万人，较 2025 年约 44.0 万人增加约 3.6%，竞争加剧，2025 年物理类本科批 436 分、特殊类型 534 分，近年波动不大；西南财经大学位于四川成都，非本省高校，在广东省无地域偏好优势；该校在广东招生人数占全国总招生比例约 3%–4%，属中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年小幅缩招（约 4.8%）、广东省物理类考生增加约 3.6% 以及学校声誉平稳等因素，缩招对位次的缓解效应略弱于考生增加带来的竞争加剧效应，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准 22630 名基础上小幅前移（位次数字减小），预测最低位次约 22033 名，区间 21533–22533 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16472→18376→19970→20470→22630, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6158 places over the past 5 years and about 2660 places over the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 22630; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong was 45 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 44 in 2024, and 42 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 40, a slight reduction of about 4.8% compared to 2025, which usually eases competition slightly, leading to a decrease in ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 66th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 65–76 range in recent years, belonging to mid-to-upper tier 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd, rated as average, with short video exposure at a medium-to-low level, showing no significant signs of increased application attention; no history of admission gaps; Applied Economics A+ (top nationally), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, providing stable attraction for applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of finance and economics majors is polarized, but SWUFE, as a veteran strong finance and economics university, still has brand appeal; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from about 440,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 436 points, special type 534 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university in Guangdong, so it has no regional preference advantage in Guangdong; the proportion of its enrollment in Guangdong to total national enrollment is about 3%–4%, which is moderate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (about 4.8%), the increase in Physics Category examinees in Guangdong by about 3.6%, and the stable university reputation, the easing effect of enrollment reduction on rankings is slightly weaker than the competition intensification effect caused by the increase in examinees. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases) from the 2025 baseline of 22630, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 22033, in the range of 21533–22533.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2790→3379→2929→2930→3145, with significant fluctuations. In 2022, there was a notable backward shift due to changes in the provincial control line. From 2023 to 2024, it stabilized, and in 2025, it slightly moved back to 3145. The fluctuation range over the past 3 years is approximately 2929–3379. The enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong Province was 30 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 18 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction trend. In 2026, the plan is 16, a reduction of about 11.1% compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction, usually easing competition and causing the ranking number to decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 66th, with stable rankings in recent years; reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin heat ranking is 92nd, evaluated as average; no history of admission gaps; Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A, Statistics A-, strong financial and economic disciplines, which have strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance and economics majors have high attention among liberal arts candidates; in 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Guangdong Province is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to approximately 292,200 in 2025, a significant increase, leading to intensified competition; regarding the provincial control line, in 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch was 464 points, special type 557 points, a significant increase compared to 2024 (undergraduate batch 428 points), reflecting changes in exam difficulty or candidate structure; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university in the province, with no regional preference advantage; the proportion of enrollment in Guangdong to the national total is about 3%–4%.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (about 11.1%) and the substantial increase in History Category candidates in Guangdong Province (about 11.6%), the easing effect of enrollment reduction on rankings and the intensifying effect of increased competition from candidate growth basically offset each other, but the candidate growth rate is slightly higher than the enrollment reduction rate, and the upward shift of the provincial control line reflects increased competition intensity. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases) based on the 2025 baseline of 3145, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 2965, and a range of 2465–3465.
